case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST VS. BENJAMIN P PANCIPANCI et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO CAPITAL ONE BANK
